economic_notes: Nation reorganized all commercial operating entities to development arm Nch'kay on June 1, 2021. Businesses include marinas, gas stations, forestry, RV park, and major real estate development through MST partnerships including Jericho lands purchase (~$138M). MST Development Corporation is 33% owned jointly with Musqueam and Tsleil-Waututh. Squamish Nation Trust holds $92.5M settlement fund from 2000 for benefit of members.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Auditor is PwC Vancouver. Nation has complex structure with 8 GBEs/GBPs accounted for by modified equity method and multiple fully consolidated subsidiaries. Squamish Nation Trust (~$92.5M settlement) is NOT consolidated. MST (Jericho 2016) LP has significant equity losses and large future purchase obligations ($138M). Nation fully repaid $16.6M Trust loan during year. Committed program funds of $13M treated as liability. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $43.6M partly due to lands/resources accommodation agreements. Revenue figures net of committed funds to next year (-$12.8M). ISC funding is only identified government transfer; no provincial transfers separately identified. Province identified as BC based on location of operations (Vancouver/North Vancouver area).
